untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'sectoral weakness' (external sector analysis), 'multi-month range detection' (requires historical range memory beyond available indicators), and 'S3 pivot level' (only S1 and S2 pivots available in allowed indicator set). Additionally, 'confluence of pivots across multiple timeframes' cannot be directly expressed with single-timeframe indicator constraints. Translated using available proxies: moving average breakdown (sma_20 cross) and S2 pivot as nearest available support level.
translation_notes: This signal relies heavily on multi-timeframe analysis and external sectoral signals that cannot be fully captured with the allowed indicator set. Used sma_20 breakdown as proxy for moving average line breakdown and s2 (available pivot) as approximation for S3 target. Entry requires price below MA and approaching support. Exit targets the S2 pivot level as the closest available proxy to the S3 levels mentioned in original signal.
